notes: Three July 2026 shows: LP + IDLES at Budapest Park (dense July week at prov-budapest-park-obuda); Oliver Tree first HU show at Dürer Kert fills Erzsébetváros (0 events). Catalog before: 3 upcoming across Belváros/Terézváros/Ferencváros only.
missingOrUncertain: LP/IDLES/Moby-style exact show start not on budapestpark.hu — using 20:00 after 18:00 gates (funcode lists 19:00 as event time).
IDLES tier breakdown not listed on official pages — single published floor from 16,500 HUF via funcode.
Oliver Tree ticket tiers/prices not published on durerkert.com or livenation at ingest time — entryFees empty; sales via livenation.hu and funcode.hu from 8 May 2026.

document.title: LP — live at Budapest Park
document.shortDescription: LP returns to Budapest Park on Tuesday 7 July 2026 — gates 18:00, Lost On You and Love Lines in South Pest (Fábián Juli tér).
document.longDescription:
Laura Pergolizzi (LP) plays an open-air headline set at Budapest Park on Tuesday 7 July 2026. Gates open at 18:00 at 1095 Budapest, Fábián Juli tér 1 (Ferencváros). Ticketed show — standing and terrace tiers on budapestpark.hu, livenation.hu, and funcode.hu (online handling fee applies).

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/en/events/lp-20260707 https://funcode.hu/en/event/3652-lp

entryFees.label: PL3 — standing (main floor)
entryFees.notes: + 1,100 Ft handling fee at online checkout

entryFees.label: Terrace — front / middle
entryFees.notes: + 1,100 Ft handling fee at online checkout

document.title: IDLES — first headline show at Budapest Park
document.shortDescription: British post-punk band IDLES with support Enola Gay — Wednesday 8 July 2026, gates 18:00 at Budapest Park.
document.longDescription:
IDLES play their first Budapest headline concert at Budapest Park on Wednesday 8 July 2026 with special guest Enola Gay. Gates open at 18:00 (1095 Budapest, Fábián Juli tér 1). Tickets via livenation.hu, funcode.hu, and budapestpark.hu.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/en/events/idles-20260708 https://funcode.hu/en/event/2943-idles https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/idles-budapest-events-edp1632063

document.title: Oliver Tree — Love You Madly, Hate You Badly at Dürer Kert
document.shortDescription: Oliver Tree’s first Hungarian show — Saturday 12 July 2026 at Dürer Kert, Erzsébetváros (Wesselényi utca), presenting Love You Madly, Hate You Badly.
document.longDescription:
Oliver Tree brings his genre-blending pop spectacle to Budapest for the first time at Dürer Kert on Saturday 12 July 2026, featuring material from Love You Madly, Hate You Badly (recorded across 82 countries). Tickets on sale via livenation.hu and funcode.hu (general on-sale from 8 May 2026, 10:00). Venue: 1075 Budapest, Wesselényi utca 52.

Sources: https://www.durerkert.com/en/event/oliver_tree_2026 https://www.livenation.hu/artist-oliver-tree-1180211

hu.title: Oliver Tree — Love You Madly, Hate You Badly a Dürer Kertben

hu.longDescription:

Sources: https://www.durerkert.com/en/event/oliver_tree_2026 https://www.livenation.hu/artist-oliver-tree-1180211
